title: Can I take a message? — новые слова

items.example: I'm sorry, she's not here. Can I take a message?
I'll call back later this afternoon.
He left a message on my voicemail.
The phone is ringing — can you answer it?
Dial the number and wait for the tone.
Please put me through to the sales department.
Hold on for a moment, I'll get him.
Don't hang up — I have one more question.
I left a message on her voicemail.
Sorry, I think I dialled the wrong number.
